title: habenaria sumatrana
intro: Habenaria sumatrana, also known as the Sumatran Habenaria, is a species of orchid native to Indonesia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Habenaria sumatrana include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, with the roots and leaves typically being used in herbal preparations.
